name: Hellkeeper
short_description: "The Ghost Migration" has begun, these labored ghosts in Outer Hell are now waiting to start a new life in Heaven. You'll play as "Hellkeeper", a position at the headquarter of Hell Departure Department, your job is to make sure only good ghost can migrate to Heaven.
detailed_description:
"The Ghost Migration" has begun

You'll play as "Hellkeeper", a position at the headquarter of Hell Departure Department

For the next 30 days, you'll be introduced with plenty of ghosts and the papers for the migration. The regulation of migration will be more and more as the migration proceeds.

After you finish your 30-day job, you might earn yourself a ticket to Heaven!

But keep in mind Hellkeeper, this is Hell, anything can happen...

Hellkeeper, make sure those who belong to Hell stay in Hell

Any wrong information on the paper should result in a denial, do not miss any of them or the the sneaky ghosts will cause chaos in Heaven, or even worse, the human world
